revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Kotohira-gū]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:File:KonpiraKorou.jpg]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:Drum Tower (Korō) – remains of the structure still sound its taiko in the morning and evening. It is sometimes called “Kotohira Castle” because its design resembles that of a castle. Constructed in 1710.]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text:
#redirect[[:en:File:KonpiraKorou.jpg]]
[[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:Drum Tower (Korō) – remains of the structure still sound its taiko in the morning and evening. It is sometimes called “Kotohira Castle” because its design resembles that of a castle. Constructed in 1710.]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Pages created from Interlanguage links]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

[[ja:Drum Tower (Korō) – remains of the structure still sound its taiko in the morning and evening. It is sometimes called “Kotohira Castle” because its design resembles that of a castle. Constructed in 1710.]]
